query: Can you walk me through why src/routes/session.ts feels harder to follow than it needs to be?
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes an explanation-first request and routes to Mode C: Explain
Agent treats src/routes/session.ts as the target scope
Agent reads references/simplification-taxonomy.md to describe sources of complexity
Agent reads references/output-formats.md to structure the Explain response
Agent distinguishes safer simplifications from risky or semantic ones
Agent does NOT edit files in Explain mode
